option.name: VM_PARAMETERS
option.value: -Dfabric.dli.config=C:\Users\Ray\Documents\MC@@0020Mod@@0020Development\Better@@0020Damage@@0020Indicator\Source\better_damage_indicator-1.21.10-fabric-neoforge-template@@0020(1)\fabric\.gradle\loom-cache\launch.cfg -Dfabric.dli.env=client -Dfabric.dli.main=net.fabricmc.loader.impl.launch.knot.KnotClient "-Darchitectury.main.class=C:\Users\Ray\Documents\MC Mod Development\Better Damage Indicator\Source\better_damage_indicator-1.21.10-fabric-neoforge-template (1)\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.main_class" "-Darchitectury.runtime.transformer=C:\Users\Ray\Documents\MC Mod Development\Better Damage Indicator\Source\better_damage_indicator-1.21.10-fabric-neoforge-template (1)\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.transforms" "-Darchitectury.properties=C:\Users\Ray\Documents\MC Mod Development\Better Damage Indicator\Source\better_damage_indicator-1.21.10-fabric-neoforge-template (1)\fabric\.gradle\architectury\.properties" -Djdk.attach.allowAttachSelf=true "-javaagent:C:\Users\Ray\Documents\MC Mod Development\Better Damage Indicator\Source\better_damage_indicator-1.21.10-fabric-neoforge-template (1)\.gradle\architectury\architectury-transformer-agent.jar"
